reviewers.note: Separate claims-boundary review in an existing reviewer task because the session thread limit prevented spawning a fourth reviewer task.

findings.title: Result binding count missed structural pattern capture names
findings.resolution: Added _binding_names coverage for Store, Del, ExceptHandler.name, MatchAs.name, MatchStar.name, and MatchMapping.rest; replaced store-only counts with name_binding_count; added ast_match_capture_result_rebind_mutation_rejected.

findings.title: Custody document under-listed newer source-proof controls
findings.resolution: Updated RECURSIVE_WAVE_OPERATOR_CUSTODY_AND_ADVERSARIES.md to enumerate import-alias, loop-target, function-default, native runtime binding shadowing, receipt lifecycle rebinding, result-store rebinding, and structural pattern-capture rebinding controls.
